descriptors.name: grain size
descriptors.physical_meaning: characteristic length scale of crystal grains
descriptors.rationale: fundamental microstructural feature controlling mechanical properties

descriptors.name: grain boundary misorientation
descriptors.physical_meaning: crystallographic angle between adjacent grain orientations
descriptors.rationale: determines grain boundary properties and energy

representation.notes: bounded between 0 and maximum symmetry angle

quality.notes: bounded scalar preserves full orientation information

descriptors.name: texture intensity
descriptors.physical_meaning: degree of preferred crystallographic orientation alignment
descriptors.rationale: quantifies anisotropy in polycrystalline material properties

representation.notes: unity represents random texture, higher values stronger

quality.loss_reason: collapses orientation distribution function to scalar
quality.notes: many distinct textures yield identical intensity

descriptors.name: grain aspect ratio
descriptors.rationale: characterizes grain shape anisotropy from processing

quality.notes: multiple grain shapes map to same ratio

descriptors.name: grain boundary density
descriptors.physical_meaning: total grain boundary area per unit volume
descriptors.rationale: affects diffusion pathways and mechanical strength

descriptors.name: dislocation density
descriptors.physical_meaning: total dislocation line length per unit volume
descriptors.rationale: primary carrier of plastic deformation information

quality.loss_reason: ignores dislocation type and spatial distribution
quality.notes: scalar hides complex dislocation network topology

representation.encoding: real number between zero and one
representation.notes: zero is unrecrystallized, one is fully recrystallized

quality.notes: bounded fraction with clear physical interpretation

descriptors.name: grain boundary character distribution
descriptors.physical_meaning: statistical distribution of grain boundary types

representation.notes: discretized orientation space or harmonic expansion

quality.loss_reason: discretization and basis truncation lose detail
quality.notes: controllable loss via basis dimensionality choice

descriptors.name: subgrain density
descriptors.physical_meaning: number of dislocation cells per volume

quality.loss_reason: ignores subgrain size distribution and morphology
quality.notes: scalar loses spatial and size heterogeneity

descriptors.name: kernel average misorientation
descriptors.physical_meaning: local orientation gradient from lattice distortion
descriptors.rationale: sensitive indicator of local plastic strain

quality.loss_reason: spatial averaging obscures detailed gradient field

descriptors.name: twin boundary fraction
descriptors.physical_meaning: volume fraction of special twin boundaries
descriptors.rationale: twins influence mechanical and corrosion properties

representation.encoding: real number between zero and one
representation.notes: subset of grain boundary character distribution

quality.notes: well-defined fraction with clear physical basis

descriptors.name: stored energy
descriptors.physical_meaning: thermodynamic driving force for microstructural evolution
descriptors.rationale: quantifies total defect energy in material

representation.notes: primarily from dislocations and grain boundaries

quality.loss_reason: aggregates multiple defect contributions into total
quality.notes: different defect configurations yield identical energy

descriptors.name: grain boundary energy
descriptors.rationale: determines grain boundary mobility and stability

representation.notes: depends on misorientation and boundary plane

quality.notes: many boundary configurations share same energy
